name: We Need to Talk About Cosby
original_name: We Need to Talk About Cosby
overview: During his nearly 50 years in show business, Bill Cosby became one of America's most recognizable black celebrities: his career was a model of excellence for millions of Americans, until the painful testimonies of dozens of women uncovered the sinister grimace behind the smile of the so-called America's dad.

trailers.title: Meet the Artist: W. Kamau Bell
